caption: A man in a grey suit jacket and white shirt stands on a stage, presenting at a conference. To his right, a large screen displays a presentation slide titled "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML". The slide lists topics including "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", and "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", concluding with the phrase "THE BIG PICTURE". At the bottom of the scene, a banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture and gestures with his hands while speaking, though his position on the stage remains constant. The screen content and the bottom banner remain unchanged throughout the frames, focusing the action on the presenter's delivery.
